calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Intervene
Off Calendar Jan-21-2020 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Paul C. Minney, Esq. of YOUNG MINNEY & CORR, LLP, T:916.646.1400, for proposed Intervenor/moving party;
Christine Chuang, Esq., Supervising Attorney General T:415.510.3525, with Garrett M. Lindsey, Esq., Deputy Attorney General T:213.269.6402 and Demian Camacho, Esq., Deputy Attorney General T:213.269.6632, for plaintiff/opposing party;
Sue Ann Salmon Evans, Esq. and Keith Yeomans, Esq., of DANNIS WOLIVER KELLY, T:562.366.8500, for defendant Sausalito Marin City School District;
Alexander L. Merritt, Esq. of SHEPPARD MULLIN RICHTER & HAMPTON LLP, T:415.774.2976, for amicus City of Sausalito.

RULING: Prior to the hearing, the Court provides the parties with a copy of his tentative ruling in the form of a proposed order. The matter was argued. After hearing, the Court allows Counsel for defendant to file a supplemental declaration to be filed no later than Friday, January 17, 2020 and,

INTERVENOR WILLOW CREEK ACADEMY's Motion To Intervene will be taken under submission upon the Court's receipt of defendant's supplemental declaration on January 17, 2020.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

1. Application To File Amicus Curiae Brief And 2. Amicus Curiae Brief Insupport Of Intervenors Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Alexander L. Merritt, Esq. of SHEPPARD MULLIN RICHTER & HAMPTON LLP, T:415.774.2976, for amicus City of Sausalito;
Paul C. Minney, Esq. of YOUNG MINNEY & CORR, LLP, T:916.646.1400, for proposed Intervenor;
Christine Chuang, Esq., Supervising Attorney General T:415.510.3525, with Garrett M. Lindsey, Esq., Deputy Attorney General T:213.269.6402 and Demian Camacho, Esq., Deputy Attorney General T:213.269.6632, for plaintiff;
Sue Ann Salmon Evans, Esq. and Keith Yeomans, Esq., of DANNIS WOLIVER KELLY, T:562.366.8500, for defendant Sausalito Marin City School District.

RULING: The Court's tentative ruling on CITY OF SAUSALITO'S Application To File Amicus Curiae Brief was uncontested and therefore adopted, as follows:

The City of Sausalito's application for file amicus brief in support of intervenor's motion to set aside judgment is granted.

Moving party to prepare and submit a proposed order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

RULING: Prior to the hearing, the Court provides the parties with a copy of his tentative ruling in the form of a proposed order. The matter was argued. After hearing, the Court allows Counsel for defendant to file a supplemental declaration to be filed no later than Friday, January 17, 2020 and,

INTERVENOR WILLOW CREEK ACADEMY's Motion To Set Aside/Vacate Judgment will be taken under submission upon the Court's receipt of defendant's supplemental declaration on January 17, 2020.
